variants.title: HiFi Filter FS 6 Breather Filter | Replaces the MP Filtri SA6F40A
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter FS 6 Breather Filter | Replaces the MP Filtri SA6F40A
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter FS 6 Breather Filter is HiFi's replacement to the MP FILTRI SA6F40A. Easy to install and replace, the FS 6 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: BREATHER FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 52.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 49.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): 3/8"-BSP, Height 1 (H1): 54.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 51.5 mm
